pairs.name: FOMC Rate Decision - March 2026
pairs.description: Federal Open Market Committee interest rate decision for March 2026
pairs.resolution_criteria: Based on official Federal Reserve FOMC announcement on March 18, 2026. Rate decision will be 0bps (no change), +25bps (hike), or -25bps (cut)

leg_a.description: Will the Fed hike rates in March 2026?

leg_b.description: Federal Reserve rate hike probability March 2026

pairs.name: CPI Release - February 2026
pairs.description: US Consumer Price Index for February 2026
pairs.resolution_criteria: Based on BLS CPI release on March 10, 2026. Resolution: Will headline CPI be above 3.5% year-over-year?

pairs.name: S&P 500 Level - Quarter End
pairs.description: S&P 500 closing level at Q1 2026 end
pairs.resolution_criteria: Based on official S&P 500 closing price on March 31, 2026. Resolution: Will SPX close above 5000?

pairs.name: Bitcoin Price - Month End
pairs.description: Bitcoin closing price at end of March 2026
pairs.resolution_criteria: Based on major exchange closing price (coinbase/kraken) on March 31, 2026. Resolution: Will BTC exceed $50,000?

pairs.name: Unemployment Rate - March 2026
pairs.resolution_criteria: Based on BLS employment report released April 3, 2026. Resolution: Will unemployment be below 4.0%?
